examples.title: Basic data list
examples.description: Renders each item using the parameterized children snippet.
examples.code: {#snippet children(user)} {user.name} {user.role} {/snippet}

examples.title: Empty state fallback
examples.description: The empty snippet renders when items is an empty array.
examples.code:
{#snippet children(item)} {item} {/snippet} {#snippet empty()}

No items to display.

{/snippet}
